== Notes for [[Item:Q90395|Q90395]] ==

'''
=Lucius Vipstanus Messalla=
'''

Lucius Vipstanus Messalla (c. 75 - aft. 115) was a Roman politician who was Roman consul in AD 115.

'''Biography'''

Vipstanus Messalla was the son of Lucius Vipstanus Messalla. He was elected consul ordinarius in AD 115 alongside Marcus Pedo Vergilianus. He had a son named Lucius Vipstanus Claudius Poplicola Messalla.

'''Source : '''

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lucius_Vipstanus_Messalla_(consul)

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
